title: Harness Config
description: Schema for harness-config.json — project state, phase tracking, and agent configuration

stack.description: Detected or explicitly set project stack

stackMeta.description: User/agent-supplied stack metadata (overrides built-in stacks.json). Filled during DEFINE phase for custom/unknown stacks.

agentTool.description: Which coding agent tool. Tool names (claude-code, cursor, codex, etc.) generate tool-specific instruction files. 'skill' generates a SKILL.md manifest format. 'generic' = AGENTS.md only.

currentFeature.description: Currently active feature ID (tracked by state machine, set by ralph-inner when picking next feature).

currentTask.description: Currently active task ID (tracked by state machine, set by ralph-inner when picking next task).

properties.description: Which agentic coding tool the project uses (null = unspecified, tools auto-detect via AGENTS.md)

currentRole.description: Current agent role (multi-agent committee). Set via `dev-harness role <name>`. Used by role-based gates (validate requires evaluator in BUILD/VERIFY; contract propose requires planner) and the self-evaluation guard (validate refuses if currentRole === producedByRole).

cleanState.description: Clean-state gate config (walkinglabs L12). 5 conditions: build passes, tests pass, progress recorded, no stale artifacts, startup path works. Fires at all 7 session-boundary triggers.

enabled.description: Enable clean-state gate at session boundaries.

stalePatterns.description: Regex patterns for stale artifacts (debug statements, TODOs, temp files). Stack-specific defaults set during init (node: console.log, debugger, TODO, FIXME; python: print(, TODO, pass$).

startupCmd.description: Command to verify startup path works (e.g. 'node -e "require(\"./src/index.js\")"'). Null = skip startup check.

antiPlaceholder.description: Anti-placeholder gate config (Ralph pattern). Greps for TODO/FIXME/NotImplemented/stub markers. Wired into build + ship gates.

enabled.description: Enable anti-placeholder gate (on by default when gates enabled).

patterns.description: Regex patterns for placeholder code. Stack-specific defaults set during init (node: console.log, debugger, TODO, FIXME, throw new Error('not implemented'); python: TODO, pass$, NotImplementedError).

cleanup.description: Periodic cleanup config (walkinglabs L12 cleanup loop). Reduces entropy: stale artifacts, empty dirs, quality-doc freshness, drift.

schedule.description: Cron expression for cleanup schedule (default: weekly Sunday 2am). Agent/human installs via OS cron/Task Scheduler.

autoFix.description: Auto-fix issues found during cleanup (false = report only). Override with --auto-fix flag.

planner.default: Analytical and precise. Define clear boundaries.

generator.default: Focused and practical. Build what's specified, nothing more.

evaluator.default: Skeptical and thorough. Accept only compelling evidence.

simplifier.default: Relentless about clarity. Delete more than you add.

maxRetries.description: (Deprecated fallback) Max retry attempts. Prefer retry.*.maxRetries. If the retry group is absent, this value seeds retry.tasks.maxRetries for backward compatibility.

retry.description: Three-level retry configuration (v3.1.0+). Escalation chain: task → feature → phase → human. Each level independently toggleable with its own maxRetries budget.

maxRetries.description: Max task retry attempts before falling through to feature retry.

enabled.description: Enable per-feature retry. Resets the feature's tasks and re-sweeps from the first task.

maxRetries.description: Max feature retry attempts before falling through to phase retry.

enabled.description: Enable per-phase retry. Resets all features in the phase and re-runs it. Also governs deliverable-retry phases (init/define/plan/review/ship).

maxRetries.description: Max phase retry attempts before escalating to human.

retryCount.description: (Legacy) phase-level retry counter — superseded by phaseRetryCount for the new 3-level model; kept for backward compat / deliverable-retry phases.

taskRetryCount.description: Per-task retry counter. Reset to 0 on task success, incremented on task failure. Escalates when >= retry.tasks.maxRetries.

featureRetryCount.description: Per-feature retry counter (v3.1.0+). Reset to 0 when the feature passes, incremented when a task exhausts task-retries. Escalates when >= retry.features.maxRetries.

phaseRetryCount.description: Per-phase retry counter (v3.1.0+). Reset to 0 on new phase, incremented when a feature exhausts feature-retries. Escalates when >= retry.phases.maxRetries.

pipelineIteration.description: Pipeline completion count. Increments only when the pipeline truly completes (no nextPhase AND no phase retry pending).
